node.text: Maria joined a nearby church to feel closer to a community and her faith, finding it to be a great experience.

node.text: Maria wants to work together with John to create a safe and bustling environment for the community and others, to make real change.

node.text: Maria had a great experience hiking with her church friends last weekend, feeling surrounded by supportive people and enjoying nature.
